titleStmt.title: SII 24.375: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 375. (A.R. No. 265 of 1930.) II PRĀKĀRA, SĒṈAIMUDALIYĀR SHRINE, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Records a gift of land measured by Rājavibhāṭaṉ by Maṇalūr Piḷḷai Appayyaṉ who had himself received it as a gift from the king (viz., Kṛishṇarāya) in the year Bhāva as one of the daśadānas on the occasion of consecrating the temple car. The gift was made for the purpose of conducting the Śrī-Rāma-navami festival in the Nalantigaḻ-Nāraṇaṉ tirumaṇḍapam with sacred bath and food offerings. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1445, Subhānu, Tulā, ba. Saptamī, Thursday, Ārdrā, regularly correspond to A.D. 1523, October 1, Thursday, ·60, ·28

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakābdam 1000 4 100 4 10 5 Itiṉmel cellāniṉṟa subhānusamvatsarattu tulāṉāyaṟṟuaparapakṣattil saptamiyum bṛha
spativāramum peṟṟa Ārdrānakṣatrattu ṉāḷ Ātreyagotrattu Āpastambasūtra ttu maṇalūr piḷḷai Appayyaṉ Inakku muṉṉāḷ perumāḷ
bhāva varuṣam kṛṣṇarāyar tiruṉāḷ tirutter pratiṣṭhākālattile dacadānattile niṉṟi yūrile rājavibhāṭaṉāl Arai nilamum tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppa
ti vikramacoḻaṉ tiruvitik kiḻ ciṟakil vaṭatuṇṭattila tiruvaṭiccāyaiyil maṉai mukkolum bhūdānamāka tiruvuThe letter vu is written below the lineḷam paṟṟukaiyil Inta maṉai
niṅkalāka nilam Araiyum śrīrāmanavami Utsavam koṇṭaruḷumpaṭi perumāḷ śrī paṇṭārattile samaṟpittapaṭiyāleThe letter le is written below the lineInta nilattil
Utayaṅkoṇṭu perumāḷ śrīrāmanavamikku puṟappaṭṭaruḷi nalantikaḻ ṉāraṇaṉ tiru maṇṭapattile Eṟiyaruḷit tirumañcaṉa
ṅkoṇṭaruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷum taḷikai 2 10 2 Atirasam 100 sukiyaṉ 100 pori yamutu Irukalamum Iḷaṉīr pānakam curuḷamutu
cāttuppaṭi Itukkuṇṭāṉa kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭapaṭikku varuṣam toṟum candrādityavaraiyum ṉaṭakka kaṭavatākavum Itu viṭṭavaṉ vi
ḻukkāṭu ṉālattoṉṟu pattik koḷḷak kaṭavārākavum .
Digital edition of SII 24.375 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
